cases.description: YEAR applied to a constructed date
YEAR applied directly to the raw serial number 1 (the classic Excel epoch, serial 1 = Jan 1, 1900)
cases.expected_note: Serial 1 is Jan 1, 1900 in the 1900 date system

cases.description: A serial with a fractional (time-of-day) component still resolves to the correct calendar year
cases.expected_note: 45366 = 2024-03-15; the .75 fractional day (18:00) is ignored by YEAR
